evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); MOS.abrirModalPrecioCurvas('IDPRO0001147'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2800)); const m=document.getElementById('pcCurvasModal'); r.existe=!!m; r.VISIBLE=m?getComputedStyle(m).display:'none'; r.rect=m?Math.round(m.getBoundingClientRect().height):0; return r; })()
